prepared_text:
Pidilite 
25th October, 2019 
The Secretary 
BSE Ltd. 
Corporate Relationship Dept.. 
14th floor, P. J. Tower, 
Dalai Street, Fort 
Mumbai - 400 001 
Stock Code — 500331 
Dear Sir. 
Sub: Intimation of Q2FY20 Earnings Call 
The Secretary 
National Stock Exchange of India Ltd. 
Exchange Plaza, Plot no. C/1, G Block, 
Bandra-Kurla Complex, 
Bandra (E), 
Mumbai - 400 051 
Stock Code - PIDILITIND 
Pursuant to Regulation 30(6) of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) 
Regulations, 2015, we wish to inform you that an earnings call will be held on Thursday, 
14th November, 2019 at 4.00 P.M. 
Please find attached herewith the earnings call details. 
The aforesaid information is also being hosted on the website of the Company viz., 
www.pidilite.corn  
Kindly take the same on your records. 
Thanking You, 
Yours faithfully. 
For Pidilite Industries Limited 
Manisha Shetty 
Additional Company Secretary 
Encl: As above 
Pidilite Industries Limited 
Corporate Office 
Ramkrishna Mandir Road 
Andheri - E, Mumbai 400059, India 
Regd. Office 
Regent Chambers, 7th Floor 
Jamnalal Bajaj Marg 
208 Nariman Point 
Mumbai 400 021 
T + 91 22 2835 7000 
2835 7952 / 2835 7365 
F + 91 22 2830 4482 
www.pidilite.com  
CIN:L24100MH1969PLC014336 

-e= AMBIT 
Acumen at work 
2QFY20 Earnings Conference Call  
Pidilite Industries Limited 
(CIN:  L24100MH1969PLC014336) 
November 14, 2019 at 4:00 pm (IST) 
 
Ambit Capital is pleased to invite you to the 2QFY20 Results Conference Call of Pidilite Industries Ltd. 
Represented by 
Mr. Apurva Parekh – Executive Director 
 
The teleconference will be moderated by Prateek Maheshwari, Institutional Equities, Ambit Capital. 
 
Conference Call Details 
Time: 4:00 pm (IST) | Date: November 14, 2019 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Primary Number India:
+91 22 6280 1148 
USA: 1 866 746 2133
+91-7045671221
UK: 0 808 101 1573
Available all over India
Singapore: 800 101 2045
Hong Kong: 800 964 448 
DiamondPass™ is a Premium Service that enables you to connect to your conference call without 
having to wait for an operator
Click here for your DiamondPass™
Local Access Number:
Toll Free Number:
Please dial the below number at least 5-10 minutes prior to the conference schedule to ensure that you are connected to the call in time.
(CIN: L24100MH1969PLC014336)
